title: Saying Farewell as a Friend Moves Abroad

all.en: My best friend Oliver had just accepted an amazing job offer in Australia.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友奧利佛剛接受了一份位於澳洲的絕佳工作機會。

all.en: Although I was truly happy for him, my heart felt heavy at the thought of him leaving.
all.zh: 雖然我真心為他感到高興，但一想到他要離開，我的心就感到沉重。

all.en: On his last evening in town, our group of friends gathered at his favorite rooftop bar.
all.zh: 在他離開的最後一個晚上，我們這群朋友聚集在他最愛的頂樓酒吧。

all.en: We ordered his favorite snacks and shared funny memories from the past ten years.
all.zh: 我們點了他最愛的小點，分享過去十年中有趣的回憶。

all.en: Someone brought a photo album they had secretly made with pictures from our adventures.
all.zh: 有人帶來了一本相簿，裡面偷偷收集了我們冒險時的照片。

all.en: Oliver flipped through the pages slowly, and his eyes started to fill with tears.
all.zh: 奧利佛慢慢地翻著相簿的每一頁，他的眼眶開始充滿淚水。

all.en: He gave each of us a small handwritten letter expressing how much we meant to him.
all.zh: 他給了我們每個人一封小小的手寫信，表達我們對他的意義有多重大。

all.en: When I read mine, I had to look up at the sky to keep from crying.
all.zh: 當我讀著我的那封信時，我得抬頭看著天空，才能忍住不哭。

all.en: We promised to visit him in Sydney and plan a big reunion within the next year.
all.zh: 我們約定要去雪梨找他，並在一年內計劃一次盛大的重聚。

all.en: At the airport the next morning, we waved until he disappeared through the gate.
all.zh: 隔天早上在機場，我們不停揮手，直到他消失在登機門後。

all.en: Even though oceans would now separate us, I knew our friendship was strong enough to last.
all.zh: 雖然海洋將我們分隔兩地，但我知道我們的友誼夠堅固，足以長久延續。

all.en: In the days after Oliver left, our group chat felt unusually quiet and empty.
all.zh: 奧利佛離開後的那些日子，我們的群組聊天室異常安靜而空蕩。

all.en: He sent us photos of his new apartment, which had a beautiful view of the harbor.
all.zh: 他寄來新公寓的照片，可以看到美麗的港口景色。

all.en: We video-called him every weekend to share updates about work and our families.
all.zh: 我們每個週末都跟他視訊，分享工作和家人的近況。

all.en: Sometimes the time difference made the calls happen at very strange hours.
all.zh: 有時候時差讓我們的通話發生在非常奇怪的時間點。

all.en: Oliver started learning to surf and posted hilarious videos of himself falling repeatedly.
all.zh: 奧利佛開始學衝浪，並上傳了自己一再摔倒的爆笑影片。

all.en: He made new friends at work, but he said no one replaced his old crew.
all.zh: 他在公司交到了新朋友，但他說沒人能取代他原本的死黨。

all.en: Six months later, I finally booked my flight to visit him during summer vacation.
all.zh: 六個月後，我終於訂好機票，準備在暑假去看他。

all.en: When I landed in Sydney, he was waiting at arrivals with a huge handmade sign.
all.zh: 我抵達雪梨時，他舉著一塊巨大的手作牌子在入境大廳等我。

all.en: We spent two weeks exploring beaches, markets, and his favorite small coffee shops.
all.zh: 我們花了兩週時間探索海灘、市集，以及他最愛的幾家小咖啡館。

all.en: Saying goodbye again was hard, but it felt easier knowing the distance was manageable.
all.zh: 再次道別雖然不捨，但知道這段距離是可以克服的，心情就輕鬆許多。

all.en: After returning home, I started recommending Sydney to anyone planning a long vacation.
all.zh: 回家後，我開始向每位計畫長假的人推薦雪梨。

all.en: Oliver and I exchanged voice messages almost every day during my commute hours.
all.zh: 奧利佛和我幾乎每天都在我通勤時段交換語音訊息。

all.en: He confessed that he sometimes felt lonely despite the beautiful weather and scenery.
all.zh: 他坦承儘管當地天氣景色都很美，他偶爾仍會感到孤單。

all.en: I encouraged him to join a hiking club to meet people who shared his interests.
all.zh: 我鼓勵他參加健行社團，結識志同道合的朋友。

all.en: Within weeks, he had befriended a kind couple who often invited him for Sunday meals.
all.zh: 幾週內，他就認識了一對親切的夫妻，他們經常邀他週日共餐。

all.en: Our group decided to send him a care package filled with snacks from his hometown.
all.zh: 我們這群朋友決定寄一個裝滿家鄉零食的關懷包給他。

all.en: He filmed himself unboxing it and laughed loudly when he saw the dried mango slices.
all.zh: 他拍下自己拆箱的影片，看到芒果乾時他大笑出聲。

all.en: For his birthday, we all coordinated a surprise video greeting from twelve different friends.
all.zh: 他生日時，我們協調了十二位朋友錄製一段驚喜的祝福影片。

all.en: Oliver replied with tears in his eyes, saying it was the best gift he had received.
all.zh: 奧利佛眼含淚水地回覆，說那是他收過最棒的禮物。

all.en: That moment reminded me that real friendship has no expiration date, only new chapters.
all.zh: 那一刻提醒了我，真正的友誼沒有期限，只有新的篇章。

all.en: Two years after Oliver moved abroad, he announced his upcoming wedding to a Sydney local.
all.zh: 奧利佛搬到國外兩年後，他宣布即將與一位雪梨當地人結婚。

all.en: Our entire group immediately began coordinating flights and accommodations for the destination wedding.
all.zh: 我們整群朋友立刻開始協調這場海外婚禮的機票與住宿。

all.en: He asked five of us to fly out two weeks early for pre-wedding adventures.
all.zh: 他邀請我們五個人提前兩週飛過去，一起進行婚前的冒險活動。

all.en: We rented a small camper van and drove along the stunning coastal highway together.
all.zh: 我們租了一台小型露營車，沿著壯麗的海岸公路一起兜風。

all.en: Oliver introduced us to his fiancée Emma, who instantly felt like an old friend.
all.zh: 奧利佛介紹我們認識他的未婚妻艾瑪，她讓人立刻覺得像是老朋友。

all.en: Emma's family welcomed us with a traditional Australian barbecue at their seaside home.
all.zh: 艾瑪的家人在他們的海邊住所以傳統澳式燒烤歡迎我們。

all.en: On the wedding day, the ceremony took place on a cliff overlooking the deep ocean.
all.zh: 婚禮當天，儀式在一處俯瞰深邃海洋的懸崖上舉行。

all.en: I gave a short speech in both English and Mandarin to honor their bicultural union.
all.zh: 我用中英雙語發表了一段簡短致詞，以紀念他們的跨文化結合。

all.en: Emma cried happy tears as I described how Oliver had kept his old friendships alive.
all.zh: 當我描述奧利佛如何讓舊日友誼延續至今時，艾瑪流下了喜悅的淚水。

all.en: Flying home, I realized our friendship had simply expanded across continents rather than fading away.
all.zh: 飛回家的途中，我明白我們的友誼只是跨越大陸延伸，從未褪色。

all.en: After the wedding, Oliver and Emma flew back home for a delayed honeymoon visit.
all.zh: 婚禮後，奧利佛與艾瑪飛回家鄉，補上延後的蜜月之旅。

all.en: We organized a casual welcome dinner at the very rooftop bar where we once said goodbye.
all.zh: 我們在當年道別的那間頂樓酒吧，舉辦了一場輕鬆的歡迎晚宴。

all.en: Emma fell in love with the night market dumplings and asked for the secret recipe.
all.zh: 艾瑪愛上了夜市的水餃，並開口詢問祕方配方。

all.en: My mother happily taught her how to fold the dumplings using a simple wooden board.
all.zh: 我母親開心地教她用一塊簡單的木板包出整齊的水餃。

all.en: Oliver surprised us with news that he had accepted a remote role with longer home visits.
all.zh: 奧利佛驚喜地宣布，他接下了一份能更常返鄉的遠端工作。

all.en: He would now spend three months of every year living among his old friends again.
all.zh: 從此他每年將有三個月時間，重新住在老朋友們之間。

all.en: We celebrated by booking a weekend cabin where everyone could relax and reconnect deeply.
all.zh: 我們訂了一間週末小木屋慶祝，讓大家放鬆並深入重新連結。

all.en: Around the campfire, Oliver admitted that distance had quietly taught him to value presence.
all.zh: 圍著營火，奧利佛坦承距離悄悄教會他珍惜當下的相聚。

all.en: Emma surprised everyone by performing a Mandarin song she had practiced for weeks in secret.
all.zh: 艾瑪驚喜地獻唱了一首她偷練好幾週的中文歌，讓大家驚艷。

all.en: Lying under the stars, I knew that real friendship simply bends instead of breaking apart.
all.zh: 躺在星空下，我明白真正的友誼只會彎折，永遠不會折斷。

all.en: When Oliver and Emma began their three-month home stay each year, our schedules slowly reorganized themselves.
all.zh: 當奧利佛和艾瑪每年開始為期三個月的返鄉同住時，我們的行程也慢慢地重新安排了。

all.en: We blocked out quiet weekends, family dinners, and small hiking trips around the nearby mountains.
all.zh: 我們預留了寧靜的週末、家庭晚餐，以及附近山間的小型健行行程。

all.en: Emma began teaching Mandarin to Australian colleagues over video calls during her time at home.
all.zh: 艾瑪利用在家鄉的這段時間，透過視訊向澳洲同事教授中文。

all.en: She joked that our city was now her second hometown and our friends her second family.
all.zh: 她開玩笑說我們的城市如今是她的第二故鄉，我們的朋友是她的第二個家人。

all.en: One quiet evening, Oliver announced that he and Emma were expecting their first baby next spring.
all.zh: 在一個寧靜的夜晚，奧利佛宣布他和艾瑪預計在明年春天迎接他們的第一個寶寶。

all.en: Our whole group erupted into cheers, and my mother immediately offered to knit tiny baby socks.
all.zh: 我們整群人歡呼起來，我媽媽立刻表示要為寶寶織小小的襪子。

all.en: Emma confessed that she wanted the baby to grow up hearing two languages and two cultures.
all.zh: 艾瑪坦承她希望寶寶能在兩種語言、兩種文化中成長。

all.en: Oliver asked our friend group to record short Mandarin lullabies for the baby's nursery playlist.
all.zh: 奧利佛邀請我們這群朋友為寶寶的搖籃曲播放清單錄製簡短的中文催眠曲。

all.en: We spent an entire evening laughing and recording soft songs while drinking warm jasmine tea.
all.zh: 我們度過了一整晚的歡笑，一邊喝著溫熱的茉莉花茶，一邊錄製柔和的歌曲。

all.en: That night, I finally understood that goodbyes are simply the beginning of bigger family circles.
all.zh: 那晚我終於明白，道別其實只是更大家族圈的開始。

all.en: When the baby arrived in late March, we received a video call from the maternity ward.
all.zh: 寶寶在三月底出生時，我們從產房接到了一通視訊電話。

all.en: Oliver held a tiny bundle wrapped in a soft yellow blanket, his face glowing with pride.
all.zh: 奧利佛抱著一個裹在柔軟黃色毯子裡的小小身軀，臉上洋溢著驕傲。

all.en: They named her Mei, hoping the name would honor both her Australian and Taiwanese heritage.
all.zh: 他們為她取名為梅，希望這個名字能榮耀她的澳洲與台灣血統。

all.en: Within a month, our entire friend group pooled money to fly out and meet the baby.
all.zh: 一個月內，我們整群朋友湊錢飛去雪梨見小寶寶。

all.en: Mei wore a tiny knitted hat my mother had finished just days before our departure.
all.zh: 梅戴著一頂我媽媽在我們出發前幾天才剛織好的小毛帽。

all.en: Emma showed us how Mei already responded to lullabies recorded by her uncles back home.
all.zh: 艾瑪向我們展示梅已經會對家鄉叔叔阿姨們錄製的搖籃曲有反應。

all.en: Oliver thanked us quietly, saying our friendship had given his daughter a whole second world.
all.zh: 奧利佛輕聲感謝我們，說我們的友誼為他女兒帶來了完整的第二個世界。

all.en: We took a long family photo on the same cliff where the wedding had once happened.
all.zh: 我們在當初舉辦婚禮的那座懸崖上拍了一張長長的全家福。

all.en: Watching Mei sleep against the sunset, I felt our story was still gently unfolding forward.
all.zh: 看著梅靠著夕陽入睡，我感覺我們的故事仍在溫柔地向前延伸。

all.en: Friendship, I realized, is not measured by distance but by the chapters we keep writing together.
all.zh: 我體會到，友誼不是以距離衡量，而是以我們一起書寫的篇章來衡量。

all.en: When Mei turned three, Oliver and Emma announced their gentle decision to return home permanently next year.
all.zh: 梅三歲時，奧利佛和艾瑪溫柔地宣布，明年將永久搬回家鄉。

all.en: They had quietly missed the slow rhythm of family dinners and the warm sound of familiar dialect.
all.zh: 他們悄悄想念家庭晚餐緩慢的節奏，以及熟悉方言溫暖的聲音。

all.en: Our whole friend group cleared schedules to help them find a small house near my neighborhood park.
all.zh: 我們整群朋友騰出時間，協助他們在我家附近的公園旁找一間小房子。

all.en: Emma began studying advanced Mandarin so she could teach Australian literature courses at our local university.
all.zh: 艾瑪開始進修高階中文，以便能在我們當地大學教授澳洲文學課程。

all.en: Mei enrolled in a bilingual kindergarten where my niece happened to be one of her quiet classmates.
all.zh: 梅進入一所雙語幼兒園就讀，我的姪女正好是她安靜的同班同學之一。

all.en: Oliver opened a small co-working space welcoming remote workers who missed deep community connections nearby.
all.zh: 奧利佛開設了一間小型共同工作空間，歡迎那些渴望深度社區連結的遠端工作者。

all.en: On the night of their housewarming, our entire group gathered around the same old rooftop bar table.
all.zh: 在他們的喬遷之夜，我們整群朋友圍坐在那家頂樓酒吧昔日的同一張桌子旁。

all.en: Mei fell asleep in my lap while the adults laughed quietly under the soft glowing string lights.
all.zh: 梅在我的腿上睡著了，大人們則在柔和的串燈下輕聲歡笑。

all.en: Looking around the table, I knew our farewell years ago had simply been a long, gentle prologue.
all.zh: 環視餐桌一圈，我明白多年前的那場道別其實只是一段漫長而溫柔的前言。

all.en: Real friendships, I finally understood, often choose their way back home no matter how far they roam.
all.zh: 我終於明白，真正的友誼無論漂泊多遠，最終往往會選擇回到家的方向。
